subcodes.first_line: O noble branch of the blessed Tree! O my God, my God! This is a branch from the sacred Tree that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الجلیل من السدره المبارکه الهی الهی هذا فرع من الشجره المقدسه التی
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @call to action, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant
